line_items.label: Revenue

line_items.label: Cost of revenue
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Cost of revenue'. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:CostOfRevenue' with value 17394. XBRL fact confirms us-gaap:CostOfRevenue = $17,394M.

line_items.label: Gross profit
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Gross profit'. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:GrossProfit' with value 26668. XBRL fact confirms us-gaap:GrossProfit = $26,668M.

line_items.label: Research and development
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Research and development'. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense' with value 3989. XBRL fact confirms $3,989M.

line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Sales, general and administrative'. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:SellingGeneralAndAdministrativeExpense' with value 1041. XBRL fact confirms $1,041M.

line_items.label: Total operating expenses
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Total operating expenses'. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:OperatingExpenses' with value 5030. XBRL fact confirms $5,030M.

line_items.label: Operating income
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Operating income'. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss' with value 21638. XBRL fact confirms $21,638M.

line_items.label: Interest income
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Interest income'. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest' with value 515. XBRL fact confirms $515M.

line_items.label: Interest expense
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Interest expense' displayed as (63). The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating' with value 63 (positive per XBRL debit convention). XBRL fact confirms $63M.

line_items.label: Other income (expense), net
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Other income (expense), net' displayed as (180). The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:OtherNonoperatingIncomeExpense' with sign='-' attribute yielding -180. XBRL fact confirms $-180M.

line_items.label: Total other income (expense), net
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Total other income (expense), net'. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:NonoperatingIncomeExpense' with value 272. XBRL fact confirms $272M.

line_items.label: Income before income tax
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Income before income tax'. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterest' with value 21910. XBRL fact confirms $21,910M.

line_items.label: Income tax expense
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Income tax expense'. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit' with value 3135. XBRL fact confirms $3,135M.

line_items.label: Net income
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Net income'. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss' with value 18775. XBRL fact confirms $18,775M.

line_items.label: Net income per share: Basic
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Basic' under 'Net income per share'. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:EarningsPerShareBasic' with value 0.77. XBRL fact confirms $0.77/share.

line_items.label: Net income per share: Diluted
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Diluted' under 'Net income per share'. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:EarningsPerShareDiluted' with value 0.76. XBRL fact confirms $0.76/share.

line_items.label: Weighted average shares: Basic
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Basic' under weighted average shares. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfSharesOutstandingBasic' with value 24441. XBRL fact confirms 24,441M shares.

line_items.label: Weighted average shares: Diluted
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML row text is 'Diluted' under weighted average shares. The ix:nonFraction tag has name='us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding' with value 24611. XBRL fact confirms 24,611M shares.

formulas.formula: Revenue - Cost of Revenue = Gross Profit
Research and development + Sales, general and administrative = Total operating expenses
formulas.operation: Research and development + Sales, general and administrative

formulas.formula: Gross Profit - Total operating expenses = Operating income
Interest income - Interest expense + Other income (expense), net = Total other income (expense), net
formulas.operation: Interest income - Interest expense + Other income (expense), net

formulas.formula: Operating income + Total other income (expense), net = Income before income tax
formulas.operation: Operating income + Total other income (expense), net

formulas.formula: Income before income tax - Income tax expense = Net income
formulas.operation: Income before income tax - Income tax expense

xbrl_not_on_statement.reason: D&A is tagged in XBRL but does not appear as a line item on the income statement. It is disclosed in the cash flow statement as an adjustment to reconcile net income to operating cash flows.

Stock-based compensation expense is tagged in XBRL but does not appear as a separate line on the income statement. It is included within cost of revenue and operating expense line items, and disclosed in the cash flow statement and Note 2.
Gain/loss on investments is tagged in XBRL but does not appear as a separate income statement line item. It is disclosed in the cash flow statement as a non-cash adjustment.
Deferred income taxes are tagged in XBRL but not shown as a separate income statement line. Disclosed in the cash flow statement as an adjustment to reconcile net income.
Other non-cash income/expense is tagged in XBRL but not shown on the income statement. It appears as a cash flow adjustment line item.
Intangible asset amortization is tagged in XBRL but not a separate income statement line item. It is disclosed in Note 7 (Intangible Assets and Goodwill).
Inventory write-down is tagged in XBRL but not shown as a separate income statement line. It is included in cost of revenue and disclosed in Note 8 (Balance Sheet Components).

formula_checks.formula: Revenue - Cost of Revenue = Gross Profit
Research and development + Sales, general and administrative = Total operating expenses
Gross Profit - Total operating expenses = Operating income
Interest income - Interest expense + Other income (expense), net = Total other income (expense), net
Operating income + Total other income (expense), net = Income before income tax
Income before income tax - Income tax expense = Net income
